g.text: Every arm below is a violation. A rule that passes both gates leaves
This draws the rules that reject or degrade. Two categories are not drawn
as arms. The provider-access rules (3, 4, 5) join rule 2 in the ClassConstraintViolation
row of the table below. The cap rules (6, 7, 8, 9, 10) do not reject at all: they
the effective value to the class maximum at reconcile time, so a workload that
asks for more silently gets the cap rather than an error.
Why the reconcile-time rules cannot be CEL.
and CEL on an Agent cannot read AgentClass (24, 26);

blocked write (29). Agentry runs no admission webhook server, so there is no third place.
